flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Central Florida fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of Central Florida rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3k → 5.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at College of Central Florida rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (57.0% → 65.5%).
